subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I turn my face toward the Kingdom of Thy mercy and supplicate before the dominion of Thy singleness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انی اتوجه الی ملکوت رحمانیتک و اتضرع الی جبروت فردانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @pain of love; love as veil, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
